item.name: Flowering Kelpie
item.description:
This wavekin, which bizarrely resembles a sinister supernatural horse rendered in petal-pink, could only have originated in Il Mheg.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: The ancestors of this bright and beautiful wavekin had scales a tawny brown, to hide themselves among the leaf litter. All that was to change when the fae folk filled Il Mheg with flowers, and the duller creatures suddenly started to stand out.
